deploy.long: Manage deployments, servers, applications and services via the Coolify API.

dev.long:
Development workflow commands for managing multiple repositories.

Includes git operations, forge integration, CI status, and dev environment management.

test_gen.long: Scan internal service packages and generate compile-time tests for their public API wrappers.

health.short: Quick health check across all repos
health.long: Show a one-line summary of repository health: total repos, dirty count, push/pull status and errors.

work.short: Combined status, commit and push workflow
work.long: Show status table for all repos, optionally commit dirty repos and push unpushed commits in a single workflow.

flag.status: Show status table only (no commit or push)

work.all_up_to_date: All repos are up to date.
work.use_commit_flag: Tip: use --commit to auto-commit dirty repos

commit.long:
Generate commit messages with Claude for repositories that have uncommitted changes.

Runs in single-repo mode when inside a git repo, or multi-repo mode with a registry.

flag.all: Commit all dirty repos without prompting

push.long:
Push all repositories that have commits ahead of remote.

Handles diverged branches by offering to pull and retry.
push.all_up_to_date: All repos are up to date.
push.diverged_help: Some repos have diverged from remote. This usually means someone pushed while you were working.

pull.short: Pull repos that are behind remote
pull.long: Pull latest changes for repositories that are behind their remote tracking branch.

flag.all: Pull all repos, not just those behind

pull.all_up_to_date: All repos are up to date.

tag.short: Tag and push all repos in dependency order
tag.long: Bump patch version, update Go dependencies, tag and push all repos in topological order.

flag.dry_run: Preview the tag plan without making changes

impact.short: Analyse dependency impact of a repo
impact.long: Show which repositories are affected when a given repo changes, including direct and transitive dependents.
impact.requires_registry: Impact analysis requires a repos.yaml registry

issues.long: Fetch and display open issues from the Forge API across all registered repositories.

reviews.long: Show open pull requests with review status across all registered repositories.

ci.long: Show CI/CD pipeline status for all repos, with pass/fail counts and optional branch filtering.

apply.long:
Execute a shell command or script in every repo directory, optionally committing and pushing changes.

Designed for safe batch operations by AI agents.
apply.warning: This will run the command in each repo directory.

flag.command: Shell command to run in each repo
flag.script: Script file to run in each repo
flag.repos: Comma-separated list of repo names to target
flag.continue: Continue on error instead of stopping

error.command_failed: Command failed — stopping (use --continue to skip failures)

file_sync.short: Sync a file or directory to repos
file_sync.long:
Copy a file or directory to matching repos, optionally committing and pushing the changes.

Designed for safe file distribution by AI agents.

error.no_targets: No target repos matched the pattern

sync.long: Scan internal service packages and regenerate public API wrappers to keep them in sync.

workflow.long: List and synchronise CI/CD workflow files across all registered repositories.
workflow.no_workflows: No workflow files found in any repo.

list.long: Display a table showing which CI/CD workflow files exist in each repository.

sync.short: Copy a workflow template to all repos
sync.long: Synchronise a workflow template file into every registered repository's .github/workflows/ directory.

boot.long: Boot the Parallels dev environment virtual machine with configurable memory and CPU.

flag.fresh: Discard existing state and boot fresh

install.long: Download and install the Parallels dev environment VM image.

serve.short: Mount project and start dev server
serve.long: Mount the current project directory into the VM and start the development server.

shell.short: Open a shell in the dev VM
shell.long: Open an interactive shell session inside the running dev environment VM.

flag.console: Use serial console instead of SSH

stop.long: Gracefully shut down the running Parallels dev environment VM.

update.short: Check for and apply VM updates
update.long: Check if a newer dev environment image is available and optionally download it.

status.long: Show installation and runtime status of the Parallels dev environment VM.

claude.short: Start sandboxed Claude session in VM
claude.long: Launch a Claude Code session inside the dev VM with project files mounted and optional authentication.

flag.model: Model to use for the Claude session

test.short: Run tests in the dev environment
test.long: Execute the test suite inside the dev environment VM with the current project mounted.

flag.name: Run only tests matching this name

vm.not_installed: Dev environment not installed. Run 'core dev install' first.
vm.up_to_date: Dev environment is up to date.

docs.long: List, scan and synchronise documentation across all registered repositories.

list.long: Show a table of documentation files (README, CLAUDE.md, CHANGELOG, docs/) for each repo.

sync.short: Sync docs to a central location
sync.long: Copy documentation from each repo's docs/ directory into a central output directory.
sync.no_docs_found: No documentation found in any repo.

git.long:
Git operations for single or multi-repo workflows.

Includes status, commit, push, pull, and safe batch operations for AI agents.

setup.short: Set up workspace and clone packages
setup.long:
Bootstrap a new workspace or clone packages from a repos.yaml registry.

In bootstrap mode (no registry), clones the devops repo first, then offers a package wizard.
In registry mode, clones all or selected packages into the packages directory.
setup.bootstrap_mode: No registry found — entering bootstrap mode
setup.nothing_to_clone: Nothing to clone — all repos already exist.

wizard.what_to_do: This directory is already a git repository. What would you like to do?
wizard.project_name_desc: Enter a name for the project directory
wizard.selection_hint: Use space to select, enter to confirm

github.long: Apply standardised GitHub settings (labels, webhooks, branch protection, security) to repos.

error.not_authenticated: GitHub CLI (gh) is not authenticated. Run 'gh auth login' first.

github.all_up_to_date: All repos are up to date

error.gh_not_found: GitHub CLI (gh) not found. Install it from https://cli.github.com/
error.registry_not_found: Registry (repos.yaml) not found. Run from a workspace directory or use --registry.
